description_long: This is a tall, angular cabinet with a modern, geometric design, featuring a deep red exterior and a contrasting light gray interior. The cabinet has a single, large door with a prominent silver handle, which opens to reveal four spacious, evenly spaced shelves inside. The back of the cabinet is adorned with three vertical, recessed lines, adding a subtle decorative element to its otherwise minimalist form. The door is slightly beveled and fits snugly against the main body, suggesting a sturdy construction. The cabinet stands on small, discrete feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its overall appearance is robust and functional, suitable for use in urban garages, workshops, or utility rooms.
description: A tall, angular red cabinet with a single door and four interior shelves, featuring a modern design and silver handle. The back has three vertical decorative lines and the cabinet stands on small feet.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the open door, silver handle, and four interior shelves.
description_view_1: Side view with the door partially blocking the cabinet body, handle visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying three vertical recessed lines and the solid red back panel.
description_view_3: Front-right view with the door fully open, clearly revealing all four shelves and the interior space.
